title: hornungia puberula
intro: Hornungia puberula is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family, also known as the mustard or cabbage family. It is native to the Indian subcontinent and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Hornungia puberula is often used in the form of infusion or decoction, and its roots and leaves are dried and powdered to make medicinal supplements.
